who: hospitality purchasing managers in restaurants processing 10-20 orders/week
offer: For hospitality purchasing managers in restaurants processing 10-20 orders/week, inconsistent inventory levels cause stockouts and overstock situations. We provide reorder alerts instead of manual tracking of inventory levels and reorder points.
problem: Inconsistent inventory levels leading to stockouts and overstock situations.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality purchasing managers
Indie Hackers posts on inventory management workflows
DM outreach to hospitality purchasing managers with demo video
Engage in community forums sharing inventory management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of inventory usage on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedule presets for users
Enable CSV import for existing inventory data
Provide one-click export of simple inventory reports
Streamline onboarding process to reduce steps
